bibliography.bibliomixed:
Ben Ben-Tzion Halevi HY, Lavine JB (2008) The thirteen principles of Jewish medical ethics.
https://www.science.co.il/jewish-studies/articles/Medical-ethics.php

Death and mourning: Jewish customs, traditions, and practices (2016)
http://www.shiva.com/learning-center/death-and-mourning/

Guidelines for health care providers interacting with Jewish patients and their families (2002).
https://www.advocatehealth.com/assets/documents/faith/cgjewish.pdf

Jewish perspectives on the birthing experience (2016)
https://www.mikvah.org/article/jewish_perspectives_on_the_birthing_experience

National Foundation for Jewish Genetic Diseases (2012)
http://www.mazornet.com/genetics/

Pew Research Center (2021) Jewish Americans in 2021.
https://www.pewresearch.org/religion/2021/05/11/jewish-americans-in-2020/
Satlow M (2006) Creating Judaism: history, tradition, practice. Columbia University Press, New York

Selekman J, Zavadivker P (2020) People of Jewish heritage. In: Fenkel E, Purnell L (eds) Textbook for transcultural health care: a population approach. Cultural competence in nursing care, 5th edn. Springer, Cham

U. S. Equal Opportunity Commission (2016)
www.eeoc.gov/
